description: Triggers for adding metrics, numbers, and quantifiable impact to resume bullets

queries.query: Add numbers and metrics to these vague resume bullets
Quantify my resume achievements — I know my impact but don't have exact numbers
My resume says 'improved performance' — help me add the specific percentage
Help me estimate and add honest quantification to my experience
I managed a team but don't know how to quantify my leadership impact
Add dollar amounts, percentages, and scale metrics to my resume
My resume lacks measurable achievements — help me add data points
Turn 'grew the user base' into a quantified achievement on my resume
What numbers should I add to make these bullets more impressive?
I reduced costs but can't remember the exact figure — help me estimate credibly
Rewrite my bullets with better action verbs and impact language
Fix my resume formatting and layout consistency
Optimize my resume for ATS keyword matching
Tailor my resume for a specific job description
Create a professional summary section for my resume
Write a cover letter for this engineering role
Optimize my LinkedIn for recruiter searches
Build an executive resume for a C-suite role
Manage multiple tailored resume versions
Prepare STAR stories for my behavioral interview
